_comment: Slack app manifest for WhisperFox. Create the app at https://api.slack.com/apps > Create New App > From an app manifest, then paste this (replace whisperfox.pages.dev with your domain). Interactivity is intentionally OFF so the 'Create a secret' URL button opens the browser without your app needing to acknowledge an interaction. The only scope is 'commands' — results post back via Slack's per-request response_url, so no bot token or chat:write is needed.

display_information.name: WhisperFox
display_information.description: Create self-destructing secrets that never touch a server.
